<script>
jQuery(document).ready(function() {
  // Functionality that controls hiding/showing the email signup lightbox
  // Check to see if cookie is set prior to showing email signup after 5 second delay
  if( Cookies.get('noti') !== 'closed' ) {
    jQuery('.email-popup-container').delay(5000).fadeIn();
  }
  // If user closes lightbox set cookie for 30 days to not show again
  jQuery('.nothanks').click(function() {
    Cookies.set('noti', 'closed', { expires: 30 });
    jQuery('.email-popup-container').fadeOut();
  });
  // If user closes lightbox with X sets cookie and doesn't hide  
  jQuery('#popup-close').click(function() {
    Cookies.set('noti', 'closed', { expires: 30 });
    jQuery('.email-popup-container').fadeOut();
  });
  // Hides the email submit form 3 seconds after a successful submission and sets 1 year cookie to disable popup
  jQuery(document).bind('gform_confirmation_loaded', function(event, formId){
    if(formId == 3) {
      Cookies.set('noti', 'closed', { expires: 365 });
      setTimeout(function() {
        jQuery('.email-popup-container').fadeOut();
      }, 3000);
    }
  });

  // Manual onClick Fade In for the Button
  jQuery('#popup-button').click(function() {
      jQuery('.email-popup-container').fadeIn();
  })

});
</script>			<div id="popup-button" class="newsletter-button">

                    };

                    return {
                        html: '<div class="fc-event-content-extension">'+ arg.event.extendedProps.imageUrl + '<div class="tw-calendar-event-content"><div class="tw-calendar-event-title"  title="'+arg.event.title+'">'+ arg.event.title +'</div><span class="tw-calendar-event-doors">' + arg.event.extendedProps.doors +'</span><span class="tw-calendar-event-time">' + arg.event.extendedProps.displayTime + '</span></div></div>'
                    }
                },
                eventClick: function(calEvent, jsEvent, view) {
                    jQuery.fancybox.open({
                        src : calEvent.event.url,
                        titlePosition: 'inside',
                        titleShow: false,
                        type : 'inline',
                        scrolling : 'no',
                        padding : '0',
                        margin : '0',
                        width:640,
                        height: 'auto',
                        autoDimensions :  true,
                        hash: false,
                        afterClose: function( instance, slide ) {
                            var uri = window.location.toString();
                            if (uri.indexOf("#") > 0) {
                                var clean_uri = uri.substring(0, uri.indexOf("#"));
                                window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, clean_uri);
                            }
                        },
                    });
                    return false;
                },
                eventRender: function(event, eventElement) {
                    if (event.imageUrl) {
                        eventElement.find('span.fc-event-title').before(jQuery(event.imageUrl));
                    }
                    if (event.title) {
                        eventElement.attr('title', event.title);
                    }
                    if (event.venue) {
                        //console.log(event.venue);
                        eventElement.find('span.fc-event-title').after(jQuery(event.venue));
                    }
                    if (event.start) {
                        eventElement.find("span.fc-event-time").prepend('Show: ');
                    }
                    if (event.doors) {
                        eventElement.find("span.fc-event-time").prepend('Doors: <span style="text-transform: uppercase;">' + event.doors + '</span><br />');
                    }
                }
            });

            calendar.render();
                    });

<script type='text/javascript'>
        jQuery(window).ready(function(){
            jQuery( 'a.fc-col-header-cell-cushion' ).each(function( index ) {
                var weekday = {};
                weekday['Sun'] = 'Sunday';
                weekday['Mon'] = 'Monday';
                weekday['Tue'] = 'Tuesday';
                weekday['Wed'] = 'Wednesday';
                weekday['Thu'] = 'Thursday';
                weekday['Fri'] = 'Friday';
                weekday['Sat'] = 'Saturday';
                var day = jQuery(this).text();
                jQuery(this).attr('aria-label','Calendar - '+ weekday[day]).attr('title', 'Calendar - '+ weekday[day]).attr('tabindex','0').attr('href', 'javascript:void(0)');
            });
            
            jQuery( 'a.fc-daygrid-day-number' ).each(function( index ) {
                var todaydate = jQuery(this).parents('td.fc-daygrid-day').attr('data-date');
                jQuery(this).attr('aria-label','Calendar '+ todaydate).attr('title', 'Calendar '+ todaydate).attr('tabindex','0').attr('href', 'javascript:void(0)');
            });
            
            jQuery('.fc-daygrid-dot-event').each(function( index ) {
                var time = jQuery(this).find('span.tw-calendar-event-time').text();
                var showtime = time.replace('Show: ', '');
                var todaydate = jQuery(this).parents('td.fc-daygrid-day').attr('data-date');
                var eventname = jQuery(this).find('div.tw-calendar-event-title').attr('title');
                jQuery(this).attr('aria-label',eventname+'|'+todaydate+'|'+showtime).attr('title', eventname+'|'+todaydate+'|'+showtime);
                jQuery(this).find('div.tw-artistcalendar-img img').attr('alt',eventname+'|'+todaydate+'|'+showtime);
            });
        });

<script>
	 jQuery(".hide-me").click(function () {
    jQuery("#top-banner-info-container").css("display", "none");
});
	jQuery(window).ready(function(){
		jQuery('ul#menu-main li a').each(function(index,item){
			var MainLinkTitle = jQuery(item).attr("title");
			jQuery(item).attr('aria-label', MainLinkTitle);
		});
		jQuery('ul#menu-footer-main-pages li a').each(function(index,item){
			var FooterLinkTitle = jQuery(item).attr("title");
			jQuery(item).attr('aria-label', 'Link For '+FooterLinkTitle);
		});
		jQuery('ul#menu-footer-sub-pages li a').each(function(index,item){
			var SubLinkTitle = jQuery(item).attr("title");
			jQuery(item).attr('aria-label', 'Sub Page Link for '+SubLinkTitle);
		});
		jQuery('ul.sub-menu li a').each(function(index,item){
			var venueSubTitle = jQuery(item).attr("title");
			jQuery(item).attr('aria-label', 'Venue Info Sub Page '+venueSubTitle);
		});
		jQuery('.pre-footer #reload_enjoyinstagram_grid_1 ul li a').each(function(index,item){
			jQuery(item).removeAttr("title");
			//var InstalinkTitle = jQuery(item).attr("title");
			jQuery(item).attr('title', 'Instragram Event Preview'+index);
			jQuery(item).attr('aria-label', 'Instragram Event Preview'+index);
		});
	});
	
</script>
